name: Lear Corporation
description: Lear Corporation is a global automotive technology leader specializing in Seating and E-Systems. With over 100 years of heritage, the company designs, engineers, and manufactures advanced automotive components for the world’s leading vehicle manufacturers. As the largest U.S.-based automotive supplier, Lear is dedicated to shaping the future of mobility by delivering innovative, high-quality solutions that enhance the driving experience. The company focuses on operational excellence, sustainability, and technological advancement to support the evolving needs of the global automotive industry.
